name: A1 BG EAD
notes:
A1 BG EAD is a leading Internet and telecommunication company in Bulgaria. We offer alternative choice of integrated communication solutions for business and individual customers. We implement cutting-edge and reliable technologies in customer's solutions or in enhancing our resources in order to provide our clients with high-quality, flexible and innovative data, voice and Internet services.
During the last years the company has established itself providing integrated internet-based solutions, combined with expertise and certain level of service. A1 BG EAD has built an image and established its position on the market offering quality and variety of services.
